# StepUp — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> STEPUP Club is a real estate investment platform founded by Moshe Tov, with over a decade of experience, that enables individuals with limited capital (from ~117,000 ILS) to enter the Israeli real estate market through a 'third of an apartment' co-ownership model, group buying power, and pre-sale opportunities. The brand is built on trust, transparency, and pragmatism — emphasizing real results over promises, with a tone that is direct, professional, and empowering. The visual identity leans into dark green and grey tones, and the site structure is a conversion-focused landing page with a clear funnel toward a personal fit consultation call.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
הצטרפו למועדון השקעות הנדל״ן StepUp והתחילו להשקיע בשוק הישראלי החל מ-117,000 ש״ח בלבד. מודל שותפות ייחודי, שקיפות מלאה ותוצאות בשטח. קבעו פגישת ייעוץ עכשיו.

### תודה שפניתם אלינו | StepUp
https://example.com/thank-you
StepUp - תודה שפניתם אלינו | StepUp

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `full_name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About StepUp
STEPUP Club is a real estate investment platform founded by Moshe Tov, with over a decade of experience, that enables individuals with limited capital (from ~117,000 ILS) to enter the Israeli real estate market through a 'third of an apartment' co-ownership model, group buying power, and pre-sale opportunities. The brand is built on trust, transparency, and pragmatism — emphasizing real results over promises, with a tone that is direct, professional, and empowering. The visual identity leans into dark green and grey tones, and the site structure is a conversion-focused landing page with a clear funnel toward a personal fit consultation call.

## Target Audience
- אנשים עם הון עצמי מוגבל המעוניינים להיכנס לשוק הנדל״ן, משקיעים מתחילים
- משקיעים עם הון עצמי מוגבל
- משקיעים מתחילים
- מקצוענים צעירים

## Industry
Real Estate Investment

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
